message:
✨ Expand filter & heater catalog with size-matched wizard filtering (#17)

- Add AquaClear 20/30/70/110 HOB filters covering 5–110 gallon range
- Add Fluval 107/307/407/FX4 canister filters covering 10–250 gallon range
- Update sponge filter titles with explicit gallon ratings
- Add Fluval P 25W/50W preset heaters for nano/small tanks
- Add Fluval E 100W/200W electronic heaters for mid-range tanks
- Add Eheim Jager 50W/75W/200W/250W/300W to cover full wattage range
- Add Cobalt Neo-Therm 25W/50W/100W/150W/200W/250W sized variants
- Add Hygger 50W/200W/500W titanium heaters for budget coverage
- Update all heater titles with "Up to X Gallon" ratings
- Wizard now filters accessories by selected tank size compatibility
- HA-compatible products sorted first with green "HA Ready" badge
- Info banner shows which tank size accessories are filtered for

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
